title: Dawn o' Plenty
description:
Vanilla+ mod that adds things that me and maybe other 
players want to be in minecraft and more!
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffef4873f5610ba35ca8f8f4c2ca99071c0fb6c6.png)

Wellcome to new and better minecraft with **Dawn o' Plenty**!


<details>
<summary>Official mod trailer</summary>

[1.0.0 trailer (relase)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d9EbT2KftTQ&t=1s)

</details>

**Dawn o' Plenty** adds a lot of features to the game like fireflys, termites, new variants of crafting tables/bookshelfs and more! Download mod and start playing because the mod does not require other mods! (for now...). Have fun!

![all item in this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec1d7e9f6ba2f5bd50908501012df07ac4cf54c4.png)
